content:
Hi everyone,
I’ve just published this puzzle as a Work In Progress and would really appreciate your feedback.
The goal was to create a simple but non-trivial optimization problem around an exact-weight knapsack variant, while keeping the statement clear and accessible.
I’m especially interested in your thoughts on:
- the clarity of the statement
- the difficulty level (currently set to “Hard”)
- the quality and progression of the test cases
- any potential edge cases I might have missed
If something feels unclear, too easy, too hard, or just “off”, feel free to point it out.
Thanks a lot for your time and help !
